queries.question: Show me the type of program for each health care centre.
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.ProgramType  from Healthcare_Centers_Programs join Programs on Healthcare_Centers_Programs.ProgramID = Programs.ProgramID join Healthcare_Centers on Healthcare_Centers_Programs.CenterID = Healthcare_Centers.CenterID   GROUP BY Healthcare_Centers_Programs.ProgramID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Healthcare_Centers_Programs.CenterID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Healthcare_Centers)

queries.question: Show me the type of program for each health care centre.
queries.sql: select healthcare_centers.centername , programs.programtype from Healthcare_Centers_Programs join Programs on Healthcare_Centers_Programs.ProgramID = Programs.ProgramID join Healthcare_Centers on Healthcare_Centers_Programs.CenterID = Healthcare_Centers.CenterID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?centername ?programtype WHERE {
  ?healthcare_centers_programs a :Healthcare_Centers_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?healthcare_centers_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?healthcare_centers a :Healthcare_Centers .
  ?healthcare_centers_programs p:hasHealthcare_Centers ?healthcare_centers .
  ?healthcare_centers p:CenterName ?centername .
  ?programs p:ProgramType ?programtype .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the type of program for each health care centre.
